name: Support billing suspension appeal policy example
answer:
Suspensions for billing issues can be appealed after the outstanding balance is paid.
Suspensions for billing issues can be appealed within 7 days.
Support automatically reinstates every billing suspension after payment.

sources.title: Support Account Suspension Policy
sources.content:
Customers may appeal an account suspension within 14 days.
Accounts suspended for confirmed abuse are not eligible for reinstatement.
Suspensions for billing issues can be appealed after the outstanding balance is paid.
